llm_explanation: With a $500,000 budget, approximately 87 premises can be covered using PON in Urban area, 2 km from CO. Trade-offs include limiting initial coverage; expansion can follow in phases.
deployment_strategy: Single phase: deploy feeder and distribution, single cabinet, then activate subscribers.
optimization_suggestions: Consider higher split ratio to maximize premises within budget.
Reuse existing ducts to reduce civil cost and extend reach.
